commit.message:
refactor: extract prompt templates from agent files into src/prompts/ modules (#124)

* refactor: extract prompt templates from agent files into src/prompts/ modules

* refactor: fix dependency direction and leaky abstractions in prompts module

- Move INJECTION_DEFENSE_PROMPT and wrapUntrustedContent to src/prompts/shared.ts
  to fix dependency inversion (prompts/ → agents/ → prompts/)
- Make prompt builders accept structured data instead of pre-formatted strings
  (language, workItemKind, reviewRound, changedFiles)
- Delete unused barrel file (src/prompts/index.ts)
- Use Pick<Issue, ...> for planner input type
- Add 25 tests for all 5 prompt builders

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: address 2nd round review feedback

- Use Language type from types.ts instead of inline "ja" | "en" literals
- Replace independent optional reviewRound/maxReviewRounds with single
  roundInfo object to enforce pair constraint
- Add negative assertion tests for fixer branch exclusivity and
  reviewFeedback precedence when both inputs are provided

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: 좌표 캡처 withdraw→iconify 변경, threading 제거 v3.5.0

withdraw()가 이벤트 루프를 막아 after() 콜백이 실행 안 됨
→ iconify()로 최소화 후 단순 after() 체이닝 사용
→ 0이 되면 메인 스레드에서 즉시 캡처+저장+창 복원

fix: 카운트다운 after() 방식 → 스레드+sleep 방식으로 교체 v3.4.8

after() 체이닝이 grab 상태에서 0에서 멈추는 근본 문제 해결:
- threading.Thread + time.sleep으로 카운트다운 실행
- UI 업데이트는 overlay.after(0, ...) 로 메인 스레드에 안전하게 전달
- 캡처 완료 후 after(0, _finish)로 창 복원

- All experiment results and insights (image & video detection)
- Overall conclusions and practical recommendations

feat: add Radio Station MFE (#606)

New micro frontend for streaming internet radio stations using the
free RadioBrowser API.

Features:
- Browse top stations sorted by popularity
- Search stations by name, country, or genre
- Favorite stations (persisted to localStorage)
- HTML5 Audio streaming with play/pause/volume controls
- Fixed player bar when a station is playing
- Station cards with favicon, name, country, tags, bitrate
- Browse/Favorites tabs

Integration:
- Shell: route (/radio), nav (daily group), widget, icon registry,
  quick access, command palette, breadcrumbs
- i18n: all 3 locales (27 keys)
- Testing: mock, vitest aliases, BottomNav test updated
- Deployment: Dockerfile, assemble-firebase, root scripts

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Migrate mwc-fab to md-fab (#982)

Replace all uses of @material/mwc-fab with @material/web/fab/fab.js.
Icons use grampsjs-icon in slot="icon" with MDI paths. Colors are
overridden via CSS custom properties in :root to match the previous
mwc-fab appearance (blue background, white icon).

commit.message:
feat: add file output to createLogger for persisting run logs (#120)

* feat: add file output to createLogger for persisting run logs

createLogger now accepts an optional logFilePath that writes log entries
to disk via appendFileSync. The run and watch commands pass
~/.aidev/runs/{runId}/run.log so execution logs are automatically saved.

* fix: Two issues: (1) appendFileSync in logger.ts had no error handling, so disk/permission errors would crash the application. (2) In cli.ts, the resume log at L189 was written before logger recreation with file output, so it was never persisted to the log file.

* fix: address logging review feedback (PR #120)

- Add setLogFile() to enable file logging after logger creation,
  fixing early log loss in run command (#1)
- Add file logging to watch command's main logger (#2)
- Replace appendFileSync with createWriteStream for async I/O (#3)
- Emit single stderr warning on file write errors instead of
  silently swallowing (#4)
- Remove backward-compat LogLevel | CreateLoggerOptions union type (#5)
- Add tmpdir cleanup in tests with afterAll (#6)
- Consolidate mkdir to cli commands, remove from persistence.save (#7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address round 2 review feedback (PR #120)

- Remove duplicate resume log before setLogFile (#1)
- Restore mkdir in persistence.save() for safety (#2)
- Add logger.flush() before process.exit() to prevent log loss (#3)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: close WebSocket spawn bypass + license enforcement hardening

SECURITY: WebSocket spawn handler now checks _effective_max_agents()
before allowing spawn — previously Community users could bypass the
5-agent limit via direct WS messages. Also syncs manager.license
from app on every WS spawn and background queue spawn to ensure
API-activated license changes take effect immediately.

Additional fixes:
- DELETE /api/workflows/{id} now gated behind Pro (was ungated)
- Backend cards use inline SVG logos instead of text letters
- 2 new tests: WS spawn limit enforcement, workflow delete gate

commit.message:
Replace TOOL: numbered dispatch with CMD: free-form commands; add output reformatter

- Remove TOOL_COMMANDS table + buildToolList/resolveToolCommand — LLM now
  writes the bash command directly as CMD: <command>, eliminating number
  lookup errors (e.g. TOOL:13 for "biggest file on desktop")
- Bump Turn 1 maxTokens 60→80 to accommodate full command strings
- Add reformatOutput(): converts raw columnar bash output to labeled
  key=value lines before Turn 2, fixing misread columns (e.g. LLM
  confusing %CPU and %MEM columns and reporting wrong process)
  Handles: ps (pid/name/cpu%/ram%), ls -l (size/file),
           df -h (filesystem/size/used/free), du -sh (size/folder)
- Remove sortNote/sortLabel — reformatOutput header is now self-documenting
- Update Turn 2 safety net: TOOL: → CMD:

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add CI, license, version, and platform badges to README

Add electron-updater with auto-download, install-on-quit prompt, and
GitHub Releases publish configuration for electron-builder.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add light/dark theme toggle, ARIA accessibility, and performance

Add theme toggle with prefers-color-scheme detection and localStorage
persistence. Add ARIA attributes across all interactive components.
Add React.lazy code splitting for modals (-22.5KB initial bundle),
image lazy loading, and toast-based error feedback in data hooks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add server hardening (gzip, CORS, rate limiting, health check)

Add gzip compression, CORS for localhost origins, in-memory rate limiting
(100 req/min per IP on /api/*), /health and /healthz endpoints, immutable
cache headers for hashed static assets, and server-side settings validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add LLM retry with exponential backoff and camera auto-reconnect

Add retry decorator for transient LLM errors (timeouts, rate limits, 5xx)
with exponential backoff (2s, 4s, 8s, max 3 retries). Add camera auto-
reconnect after 3 consecutive capture failures with 30s cooldown.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add data retention auto-cleanup and CSV/JSON export API

Add configurable data retention (default 90 days) with automatic cleanup
of old frames, summaries, and events. Add 'life cleanup' CLI command.
Add export API endpoints for frames (CSV/JSON), summaries, and reports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add error boundary, toast notifications, and onboarding

Add ErrorBoundary for crash recovery, toast notification system for
user-facing error feedback (replacing console.error), and 3-step
onboarding wizard for first-time users.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

test: add Python and frontend test suites

Add 131 Python tests (config, activity, database, analyzer, retention) and
17 frontend tests (activity utils, date utils, i18n consistency). Configure
pytest-cov for coverage reporting, vitest with jsdom environment, and add
@vitest/coverage-v8 for frontend coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: add GitHub templates and CI workflow

Add issue templates (bug report, feature request), PR template, and
GitHub Actions CI with Python lint/test, web lint/test, security scanning,
and Docker build verification. Includes dependency caching and coverage reporting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add OSS governance files (LICENSE, CONTRIBUTING, COC, SECURITY, CHANGELOG)

Add MIT License, contribution guidelines, Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct,
security vulnerability reporting policy, and changelog. Include .env.example
documenting all required environment variables.

Update all 55 GitHub URL references across docs, pyproject.toml,

fix: Minecraft MCP サーバーのマルチセッション対応 (#91)

* fix: Minecraft MCP サーバーをマルチセッション対応に変更

MCP SDK の Protocol.connect() は 1 インスタンスにつき 1 トランスポートしか
受け付けないため、2 番目以降の Guild セッションで接続エラーが発生していた。
SDK 公式パターンに従い、セッションごとに新しい McpServer インスタンスを
生成するファクトリ関数方式に変更。

- createServer() 失敗時に 500 レスポンスを返すよう try-catch を追加
- startHttpServer から closeAllSessions を公開し、shutdown 時に
  アクティブな全セッションの server/transport を閉じるように修正

repository.description: Discord Bot with OpenCode Inside

commit.message:
fix(entity): preserve XP/level across all unbind/rebind paths

All 7 createDefaultEntity() call sites that reset entity state now
preserve existing xp and level values. Previously only `name` was
preserved, causing XP to silently reset to 0 whenever an entity was
unbound (bot-initiated, device-owner, scheduler cleanup, official
borrow) or rebound (bind-free, bind-personal).

Fixes #156: Channel entity XP anomalous reset to 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Guard against zero-atom molecules in smiles_to_3d_sdf

SELFIES can occasionally decode to empty/invalid SMILES that RDKit
parses as a molecule with 0 atoms, causing ValueError in EmbedMolecule.
Add GetNumAtoms() == 0 check before and after AddHs.
